content.name: Functional Groups
content.description: Common organic functional groups and their properties

cards.front: What is the functional group of an **alcohol**?
cards.hint: Think of water with one H replaced

cards.front: Draw the structure of a **carboxyl group**
cards.back:
**–COOH** (or –C(=O)OH)

Contains both a carbonyl and a hydroxyl group

cards.front: What is the characteristic bond in an **alkene**?
cards.back:
A carbon-carbon **double bond**: **C=C**.

This bond makes alkenes more reactive than alkanes.
cards.hint: It has one more bond than an alkane.
